torch_pattern: scores = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-2, -1)) * scale; scores = scores + attn_mask; probs = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1); out = torch.matmul(probs, V)  # reference: torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention(Q, K, V, attn_mask=attn_mask, scale=scale) on K/V cache slices up to cur_pos

source: torch_pattern derived from tt-metal sdpa_decode test reference (torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention over KV cache slice at cur_pos); golden_src not registered
